title: A1: Tool/file/server rename pass (rule-* → knowledge-*)
description: Full rename pass. Rename MCP tool fab_get_rule_sections → fab_get_knowledge_sections. Rename MCP server name fabric-context-server → fabric-knowledge-server (packages/server/src/index.ts line 112). Batch-rename server files: rule-meta-builder → knowledge-meta-builder, rule-sections → knowledge-sections, rule-sync → knowledge-sync, get-rules → get-knowledge, api/rules.ts → api/knowledge.ts, api/rules-context.ts → api/knowledge-context.ts, tools/rule-sections.ts → tools/knowledge-sections.ts. Drop from agents.meta node schema 5 dead fields: level, layer (path-derived, drop schema field but layer attribute on knowledge entries stays), deps, topology_type, priority. Drop from plan_context output schema: selection_policy, required_stable_ids, ai_selectable_stable_ids, initial_selected_stable_ids. Update three Skill templates (fabric-archive/review/import SKILL.md) to use fab_get_knowledge_sections. Anchors: rc5-rc6-handoff.json#code_anchors.packages/server/src/index.ts:106-107,112 + plan-context.ts:47,109,229,244-245,298,383-392.

files.target: lines 106-107 tool registration + line 112 server name
files.change: Rename fab_get_rule_sections registration → fab_get_knowledge_sections; server name → fabric-knowledge-server
Rename file; rename exported tool definition; update tool name string
Rename file + exported symbols (buildRuleMeta → buildKnowledgeMeta, KNOWLEDGE_SUBDIRS already aligned)
Rename file + exported symbols (ensureRulesFresh → ensureKnowledgeFresh, reconcileRules → reconcileKnowledge)
Drop fields: level, deps, topology_type, priority (layer concept may stay as attribute on knowledge frontmatter)
Drop selection_policy, required_stable_ids, ai_selectable_stable_ids, initial_selected_stable_ids; rename rule_sections schema → knowledge_sections
Update route paths for /api/knowledge and /api/knowledge-context (or keep /api/rules legacy alias if desired — confirm scope says no)

implementation: Run grep -rn 'fab_get_rule_sections\|fabric-context-server\|rule-meta-builder\|rule-sections\|rule-sync\|get-rules\|api/rules' packages/ to inventory all touch sites
Use IDE-style rename refactor: for each file, mv + update all import paths via grep+sed batch
Update tool name string in tools/knowledge-sections.ts and registration in index.ts line 106-107
Update server name string at index.ts line 112
Edit shared/src/schemas/agents-meta.ts: remove level/deps/topology_type/priority from agentsMetaNodeBaseSchema
Edit shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts: drop the 4 selection_policy-related fields from plan_context output schema
Rename Zod schema names (ruleSectionsInputSchema → knowledgeSectionsInputSchema, etc.)
Update three Skill templates: replace tool name strings in SKILL.md files
Run pnpm -w build; fix any remaining TS errors
Run pnpm -w test; update test fixtures referencing old names

reference.examples: Mirror prior rule-* infrastructure; preserve internal structure but renamed

criteria: MCP tool registry contains 4 tools: fab_plan_context / fab_get_knowledge_sections / fab_extract_knowledge / fab_review (no fab_get_rule_sections)
Server file names: knowledge-meta-builder / knowledge-sections / knowledge-sync / get-knowledge / api/knowledge.ts / api/knowledge-context.ts / tools/knowledge-sections.ts (rename complete)
agents.meta nodes lack fields: level, layer, deps, topology_type, priority
plan_context output lacks fields: selection_policy, required_stable_ids, ai_selectable_stable_ids, initial_selected_stable_ids
Three Skill templates updated to use fab_get_knowledge_sections
pnpm -w build green; pnpm -w test green

rationale.chosen_approach: Single coordinated rename pass (Wave-2 sequential because file renames cascade through imports)
decision_factors: v2.0.0 unpublished — free to break wire
Zero users means aliases add noise without benefit
rationale.tradeoffs: Larger diff; one big commit. Acceptable given pre-publish status

manual_checks: Boot fabric serve, run fab_plan_context via MCP client, confirm tool list contains fab_get_knowledge_sections
success_metrics: 0 occurrences of legacy names in source
Existing tests pass after fixture updates

risks.description: Stale references in tests / fixtures break build
risks.mitigation: grep test fixtures and update in same commit

risks.description: MCP clients hard-coded to old tool name

key_functions.signature: createFabricServer(opts) — register fab_get_knowledge_sections tool with renamed handler
